features: MOISTURISING FORMULA: Enriched with Cocoa Butter, this lip therapy balm deeply nourishes and moisturises dry, chapped lips for long-lasting comfort
PACK CONTENTS: Set includes 2 tins of Cocoa Butter Lip Therapy balm, each containing 20g of premium lip care treatment
HEALING PROPERTIES: Specially formulated petroleum jelly base creates a protective barrier to lock in moisture and help heal dry lips
SOOTHING CARE: Non-sticky, smooth texture provides immediate relief and softness to damaged, dehydrated lips
CONVENIENT PACKAGING: Compact, portable tins are perfect for on-the-go lip care, fitting easily in pockets or handbags
description: Product Description DESCRIPTION : BRAND VASELINE COCOA BUTTER LIP BALM 20 G TIN LIP BALM COCOA BUTTER NON - STICKY OR NON - GREASY LIP THERAPY TINS WITH THEIR ORIGNAL RETRO LOOK ARE PERFECT TO HELP KEEP LIPS HEALTHY AND PROTECTED FROM THE ELEMENTS. VASELINE LIP BALM & LIP THERAPY 20 TIN PACK OF 2 : COCOA BUTTER 20 G TIN The lips feel soft and smooth NOURISHES DRY &CHAPPED LIPS Prevents chapped and cracked lips. NON-STICKY, NON-GREASY Daily lip protection. GIVES NATURAL GLOSSY SHINE Contains 2 x cocoa butter 20g tins. PERFECT FOR LIP CARE : VASELINE 20 G TIN : NOURISHES THE LIPS NON - STICKY & NON - GREASY HEAL CHAPPED LIPS PROTECTS LIPS FROM DAMAGE NATURAL GLOSSY SHINE SOOTHE & HEAL DRY LIPS
